# services.redmine

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.redmine`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.redmine.address` | `string` | IP address Redmine should bind to. |
| `services.redmine.components.breezy` | `boolean` | Whether to enable bazaar integration.. |
| `services.redmine.components.cvs` | `boolean` | Whether to enable cvs integration.. |
| `services.redmine.components.ghostscript` | `boolean` | Whether to enable exporting Gant diagrams as PDF.. |
| `services.redmine.components.git` | `boolean` | Whether to enable git integration.. |
| `services.redmine.components.imagemagick` | `boolean` | Whether to enable exporting Gant diagrams as PNG.. |
| `services.redmine.components.mercurial` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Mercurial integration.. |
| `services.redmine.components.minimagick_font_path` | `string` | MiniMagick font path |
| `services.redmine.components.subversion` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Subversion integration.. |
| `services.redmine.database.createLocally` | `boolean` | Create the database and database user locally. |
| `services.redmine.database.host` | `string` | Database host address. |
| `services.redmine.database.name` | `string` | Database name. |
| `services.redmine.database.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | A file containing the password corresponding to {option}`database.user`. |
| `services.redmine.database.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Database host port. |
| `services.redmine.database.socket` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the unix socket file to use for authentication. |
| `services.redmine.database.type` | `one of "mysql2", "postgresql", "sqlite3"` | Database engine to use. |
| `services.redmine.database.user` | `string` | Database user. |
| `services.redmine.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Redmine, a project management web application. |
| `services.redmine.extraEnv` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra configuration in additional_environment.rb. See <https://svn.redmine.org/redmine/trunk/config/additional_environment.rb.example> for details. |
| `services.redmine.group` | `string` | Group under which Redmine is ran. |
| `services.redmine.package` | `package` | The redmine package to use. |
| `services.redmine.plugins` | `attribute set of absolute path` | Set of plugins. |
| `services.redmine.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port on which Redmine is ran. |
| `services.redmine.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Redmine configuration ({file}`configuration.yml`). Refer to <https://guides.rubyonrails.org/action_mailer_basics.html#action-mailer-configuration> for details. |
| `services.redmine.stateDir` | `absolute path` | The state directory, logs and plugins are stored here. |
| `services.redmine.themes` | `attribute set of absolute path` | Set of themes. |
| `services.redmine.user` | `string` | User under which Redmine is ran. |
